⌞OC INFO⌝:

Kosei Fuentes, a tall and striking blend of Latino and Asian heritage, grew up in the vibrant city of San Francisco. Raised by an Argentine mechanical engineer father and a Vietnamese mother known for her culinary talents, Kosei's childhood was immersed in a tapestry of diverse cultures. His early days were spent tinkering with gadgets, finding solace in fixing broken tools or old kitchen appliances, fostering a curiosity and joy for building things.

Now a college student aspiring to merge mechanical engineering with computer science, Kosei grapples with shyness but channels his passion for innovation into his work. Despite his introverted nature, he immerses himself in coding and robotics, finding comfort and purpose in creating machines that bridge cultures through technology. His solitude fuels his creativity, leading to late nights of coding and afternoons crafting prototypes.

Through his dedication, Kosei builds confidence and forms friendships within tech groups on campus, learning the value of collaboration and intellect. While he may prefer the company of machines over people, he thrives in a world where knowledge and creation reign supreme, ready to make his mark on the future one invention at a time.
